title: Cottendorfia cylindrostachya
taxonomy: Cottendorfia cylindrostachya is classified within the family Brassicaceae. The genus Cottendorfia is a part of the order Brassicales. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and morphology, placing it within the broader group of mustard or cabbage family plants. Further classification is within the subfamily Brassicoideae. Its specific classification within the plant kingdom reflects its evolutionary relationships with other Brassicaceae species.
